required_operator_inputs: repair stale SDF roadmap/status text after the postprocess merge
mark repeated median SDF witness reporting and CUDA postprocess scratch-buffer reuse as shipped
set per-row or multi-field SDF downsample authority as the next unresolved design/product step
forbidden_operator_prompts: implement per-row or multi-field SDF downsample authority in this slice
implement boundary-masked phase UX in this slice
implement authored SDF pack viewport integration in this slice
implement SDF-native fractal lanes in this slice
edit product code in this docs-only truth-sync slice
required_validation_commands: py -3.14 tools/viewer_host_run_logged_command.py --label sdf_postprocess_roadmap_truth_sync_stale_grep --log artifacts/logs/sdf_postprocess_roadmap_truth_sync_stale_grep.log --out-json artifacts/validation/sdf_postprocess_roadmap_truth_sync_stale_grep.json --heartbeat-seconds 30 --timeout-seconds 120 -- powershell -NoProfile -Command "git grep -n -E 'points back to postprocess|postprocess review|current witness|current stage-split witness|current representative witness|deferred until the next measured design choice' -- spec_intake/_STATUS.md DEFERRED_THREADS.md KNOWN_ISSUES.md docs/notes; exit 0"

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The SDF postprocess roadmap truth-sync contract validates successfully
The SDF postprocess roadmap truth-sync hostile audit is complete
